creator: r.c.ladan@gmail.com
text:
- Update to 0.3.0.1
 Changes include:
    - support for RZX rollback, microdrive images, Z80Em and CSE tape 
 files, TS2068 chipset
    - support for tape file editing
 
 Port maintainer (kemm@in-line.ru) is cc'd.
 
 Generated with FreeBSD Port Tools 0.77
 
 This PR should be committed in conjunction with the PR to update 
 emulators/fuse to avoid breaking the latter.
